# CredentialSessionWindowSceneEvent.readerDetected

**Case**

External NFC reader is detected, i.e. presence of a NFC field

## Declaration

```swift
case readerDetected
```

## Events

- **CredentialSessionWindowSceneEvent.presentation**: User has perform gesture on device to request for app presentation
